title: athroisma pusillum
intro: Athroisma pusillum, also known as small-leaved athroisma, is a small, annual herb native to Australia and parts of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. It is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and easing digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Athroisma pusillum is often made into a tea or infusion, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
